data.body: Starting full implementation of epic 5fd2-a7c2-0aec-48fa. State: 13/14 children OPEN; only ce75 (kill-switch config) closed. No production code in src/rebar — only experiment harnesses under docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/. Plan: build MVP vertical slice (DET floor + registry/orchestrator + one criterion + Pass1/2/3 + attestation + claim integration) per epic BUILD ORDER, then fan out remaining passes/overlays/eval/docs, then enable in .rebar config.
